# Documentation of _Diagonale_ for MATLAB

Toolbox for statistical data analysis

Software available at: [GitHub repository](https://github.com/GermanoGallicchio/Diagonale)

Cite as (APA style): 
Gallicchio, G. (2025). _Diagonale_ [software]. Zenodo. https://doi.org/10.5281/zenodo.16808782


**Note: this documentation is work in progress**

1. Installation [link](https://germanogallicchio.github.io/Diagonale_documentation/installation.html)
1. Analysis parameters decision tree [link](https://germanogallicchio.github.io/Diagonale_documentation/decisionTree.html)
1. Analysis parameters definitions **coming soon**
1. Tutorials **coming soon**
